title: OX Pro 12mm Notch Trowel
description: Product DescriptionOX Pro Notched TrowelThe OX Pro Notched Trowel is your ultimate tool for easy application of adhesives on any surface. The square-shaped notches of the trowel help to spread the material quickly and with minimum effort. The blade of the flooring trowel is made using high-quality carbon steel, and the strong aluminum shank ensures the durability of the tiling trowel. For extreme comfort and a strong grip, the tiling trowel is provided with a soft, dura grip handle.Founded in 1974 in Australia, OX Tools has since worked alongside tradesmen to deliver just what they need! Our products are built using only the finest materials and go through stringent quality control to ensure that you get nothing but the best. For 40+ years, OX Tools has been instinctively recognised as a premium manufacturer of hand and power tools that are tough, dynamic, dependable and most importantly affordable across the globe. We're proud to be known for raising the benchmark of hand and power tools in the UK since 2012. Features: Carbon steel bladeCarbon steel bladeHeavy-duty shankHeavy-duty shankDura-grip handleDura-grip handleSquare shaped notchesSquare shaped notches115x 280mm - 6mm notch115x 280mm - 6mm notchPackage Includes:  1 x OX Pro Notched TrowelSafety WarningPay attention to protection for the eyes when digging. Note possible underground supply lines. Use the tool with care to avoid injury.
features: STEEL CONSTRUCTION: The blade of the Pro Notch Trowel is made using high-quality carbon steel for enhanced longevity and durability.
HEAVY DUTY SHANK: The steel blade of the Pro Notch Trowel is attached to the handle through a strong aluminum shank which prevents handle from warping.
DURA-GRIP HANDLE: For extreme comfort and a strong grip, the Pro Notch Trowel comes with a soft, dura grip handle.
STANDARD DESIGN: The Pro Notch Trowel is designed perfectly to ease the spreading of adhesives and setting materials to various surfaces quickly.
QUALITY YOU CAN RELY UPON: Engineered with top-notch materials and tested for optimum performance, our tools are sure to make the work on the site convenient, smooth and quick.
